value: semiosis improvement session (2026-06-21). FIXES landed (branch claude/hopeful-albattani-evgbbf, sha ae0cbc8): (1) CRITICAL pyproject build-backend was 'setuptools.backends.legacy:build' (nonexistent module) -> broke pip install entirely; fixed to 'setuptools.build_meta'. (2) core/dag.py was all NotImplementedError stubs; wired to real build_encoder/fit_octave_nodes + Dagster assets embeddings->cone_nodes->store_snapshot. GOTCHA: 'from __future__ import annotations' breaks dagster Config field type resolution (DagsterInvalidPythonicConfigDefinitionError); must omit it in modules defining dagster.Config classes. (3) geodesic_distance self-distance failed at float32 (0.00048 > 1e-4); fixed with identity short-circuit (np.array_equal) + double-precision torch tensors in core/cone_engine.py:243. (4) Added README.md, core/test_dag.py. (5) gitignored .gm/disciplines/codeinsight{,-vec,-manifest}/ (machine index churn, were dirtying tree every session) + git rm --cached. Test: pytest core/ = 138 passed 2 skipped. Env note: pip install conflicts on debian-managed blinker -> use --ignore-installed blinker.
